name: Suede Skills MCP
summary: Local MCP access to an open-source Suede skill pack: full-stack design and writing modes, reference-site restyling, SEO/AEO/AI EO, visibility grading, AI eval design, one-pass code review+grade, any-repo CI ship-gate, agent-team orchestration, Codex CLI worker-fleet orchestration, install and launch packaging, MCP QA, artist campaign tools, and creator rights utilities.

publicLinks.label: GitHub Pages site
publicLinks.description: Public landing page for Suede Creator Skills, install paths, docs, skill catalog, and open-source project links.

publicLinks.label: Public explainer
publicLinks.description: Long-form Markdown guide explaining Suedify, public skills, MCP, SEO/AEO/AI EO audits, QA, social posts, emails, FAQ, and claim boundaries.

publicLinks.label: Copy bank
publicLinks.description: Public copy bank for GitHub, docs, CTA, SEO/AEO/AI EO, FAQ, social, and safety copy.

publicLinks.label: Public installs and MCP
publicLinks.description: Public GitHub skill install commands and Suede Skills MCP guidance.

publicLinks.label: Develop with Suede
publicLinks.description: CTA for people who want Suede to turn a site, campaign, app surface, or design system into a more polished public workflow.

plugins.name: suede-workflow-skills
plugins.description: Public open-source workflow umbrella: full-stack design and writing modes, reference-site restyling, SEO/AEO/AI EO, visibility grading, AI eval design, site alchemy, one-pass code review+grade, any-repo CI ship-gate, Codex CLI worker fleets, MCP QA, launch + install packaging, artist campaigns, and creator rights utilities.

plugins.name: suede-creator-skills
plugins.description: Public artist and creator skills: a full artist campaign builder, neutral sync review packaging, release linting, rights packages, and a rights-readiness audit with provenance, licensing, and royalty-routing lanes.
plugins.publicInstall: python3 ~/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/scripts/install-skill-from-github.py --repo JasonColapietro/suede-creator-skills --path skills/suede-campaign-in-a-box skills/suede-sync-packaging skills/suede-release-linter skills/suede-rights-passport skills/suede-rights-audit

skills.name: android-app-factory
skills.description: Plan or build a native Android app end to end: keyword selection, Kotlin + Jetpack Compose scaffolding, Play Billing, Play Store screenshots and ASO listing copy, Data Safety and content-rating disclosure, signing, and Google Play Console release.
skills.useWhen: The user wants to plan, build, or ship a native Android app from an idea, keyword, or existing spec, or prepare a Play Store listing and release.

skills.name: amazon-returns-recovery
skills.description: The pack's contract/customer-service negotiator, proven outside a repo: scans an Amazon account for restocking fees, short refunds, and forgotten or overpriced digital subscriptions (Britbox, Starz, and other Prime Video Channels, Audible, Kindle Unlimited, Prime itself), then drives Amazon's live chat to get fees waived, refunds issued, or unused subscriptions canceled and the last charge refunded. Recovered $448.31 in real cases, including overturning a previously denied refund after the return window closed. Requires the Claude in Chrome extension.
skills.useWhen: The user mentions Amazon returns, restocking fees, a refund that looks short, or wants to check whether Amazon still owes them money on a past return.

skills.name: johnny-suede-design
skills.description: Design and write polished product surfaces people understand fast: landing pages, dashboards, campaigns, restyles, UI copy, and visual QA.
skills.useWhen: Design, restyle, or build a polished surface with copy, UI, product screenshots, visual QA, and multi-lane coordination when needed.

skills.name: johnny-suede-write
skills.description: Write sharper Suede copy for docs, pages, email, social, headlines, CTAs, product listings, and public explainers.
skills.useWhen: Write, rewrite, package, explain, promote, audit, or polish public copy with the full Suede writing stack.

skills.name: site-to-ios-app
skills.description: Turn a website, PWA, dashboard, or marketplace into an iOS app with App Store strategy, screenshots, metadata, and release gates.
skills.useWhen: Convert a website or web app into an iOS app plan or shell that can survive App Store review.

skills.name: subscription-recovery
skills.description: The pack's contract negotiator, generalized beyond Amazon: audits recurring charges across App Store, Google Play, PayPal, and direct-bill services (Netflix, Spotify, gyms, SaaS tools), then cancels unused subscriptions or negotiates a refund through that service's own support. Complements amazon-returns-recovery, which stays scoped to Amazon.
skills.useWhen: The user wants to audit recurring charges generally, asks what subscriptions they're paying for, mentions a non-Amazon subscription by name, or wants to find and cancel unused subscriptions.

skills.name: suede-agent-teams
skills.description: Split complex work into coordinated agent lanes with WIP checks, quality gates, rollback plans, and handoffs that prove what shipped.
skills.useWhen: Coordinate large changes across safe lanes with collision checks, quality gates, rollback planning, and a verified handoff.

skills.name: suede-ai-eval
skills.description: Design AI evals that catch regressions before users do: rubrics, test cases, failure modes, acceptance gates, and AI-SPEC artifacts.
skills.useWhen: Define measurable quality, safety, and regression checks for LLMs, classifiers, recommenders, agents, RAG, search, and media generation.

skills.name: suede-campaign-in-a-box
skills.description: Turn a song or release into a full artist campaign: hooks, rituals, visuals, merch, rollout calendar, email, site copy, and fan actions.
skills.useWhen: Turn the artist world and rollout into usable campaign moves.

skills.name: suede-code
skills.description: Review and grade code in one pass: real findings, A-F ship verdict, auth/payment risk, OWASP checks, deploy safety, and fix briefs.
skills.useWhen: Review, grade, audit, security-check, or ship-gate a diff, PR, file, branch, or release.

skills.name: suede-code-grader
skills.description: Give a blunt A-F ship verdict for a code change across correctness, security, data, UX, verification, and deploy readiness.
skills.useWhen: Get a direct ship/no-ship grade with evidence instead of a full line-by-line review.

skills.name: suede-code-review
skills.description: Find the bugs a diff can actually ship: TypeScript, React, Next.js, OWASP, accessibility, SEO, database, and deploy-risk review.
skills.useWhen: Deep-review or security-check a diff, PR, file, branch, or release when the deliverable is findings, not a grade.

skills.name: suede-codex-fleet
skills.description: Claude-directed parallel OpenAI Codex CLI worker fleet for bulk generation. Use when a job is high-volume, well-specified, and splits into independent worker-sized tasks (content batches, test generation, bulk refactors) and Codex CLI is installed and logged in. Claude decomposes, briefs, spawns codex exec runs in parallel, and review-gates every output. NOT FOR: multi-lane Claude agents coordinating one complex change (use suede-agent-teams); low-volume, judgment-dense copy Claude should write itself (use suede-copy or johnny-suede-write).
skills.useWhen: Send high-volume, well-specified work to parallel Codex CLI workers and review every output before it ships.

skills.name: suede-copy
skills.description: Write conversion copy that earns the click: landing sections, email, microcopy, buttons, headlines, CTAs, variants, and anti-slop edits.
skills.useWhen: Write or rewrite headlines, CTAs, landing copy, email, social, and microcopy with conversion and anti-slop checks.

skills.name: suede-design
skills.description: Make Suede interfaces feel intentional: tokens, color, components, type, motion, dark mode, and visual QA for shipped screens.
skills.useWhen: Polish UI, set tokens, fix hierarchy, and run focused design QA on a single surface.

skills.name: suede-launch-packaging
skills.description: Package finished work so people can use it: README, docs, install commands, proof links, QA, release copy, and handoff notes.
skills.useWhen: Package a skill, repo, site, MCP server, feature, docs update, failed install, or public launch so a stranger can use it.

skills.name: suede-mcp-qa
skills.description: Catch MCP drift before release: skill catalogs, tool and resource schemas, prompts, install paths, JSON-RPC behavior, and docs alignment.
skills.useWhen: Validate the Suede Skills MCP, catalog, tool schemas, prompts, resources, install guidance, and docs.

skills.name: suede-recommend-next-action
skills.description: Reads current repo, terminal, plan, or handoff state, scores 2-4 candidate moves on goal alignment, unblocking, evidence, urgency, and leverage, and returns one recommendation packaged as a short runnable prompt, expanding into a full operator or granular prompt only on request.
skills.useWhen: The user asks what's next, what to do next, to recommend the next move, or to give/expand/granularize a prompt after a review, audit, plan, or stalled task.

skills.name: suede-release-linter
skills.description: Audit creative release folders before handoff: metadata, file structure, artwork, lyrics, stems, rights blockers, and platform readiness.
skills.useWhen: Check a release folder before release, licensing, registry prep, royalty routing, agent commerce, or transfer-package handoff.

skills.name: suede-rights-audit
skills.description: Find the rights gaps before packaging: ownership, splits, samples, provenance, metadata, licensing readiness, royalties, and intake blockers.
skills.useWhen: Map rights gaps before rights packaging, provenance mapping, licensing prep, registry readiness, royalty routing, or creator review.

skills.name: suede-rights-passport
skills.description: Package creative project folders into rights-ready handoffs: files, metadata, credits, splits, licenses, stems, lyrics, artwork, and notes.
skills.useWhen: Package a creative project into a rights and provenance transfer handoff.

skills.name: suede-seo-audit
skills.description: Run a nine-lane SEO, AEO, and AI-citation audit: access, intent, metadata, structure, schema, E-E-A-T, clusters, and rewrite fixes.
skills.useWhen: Audit Suede pages, GitHub Pages, README files, skill docs, launch pages, copy banks, install pages, and AI-result surfaces.

skills.name: suede-ship-gate
skills.description: Make CI hold the line: path-aware builds, required checks, branch protection, duplicate pipeline repair, and merge gates that do not deadlock.
skills.useWhen: Add CI, protect main, repair duplicate or hanging pipelines, and make required checks hold.

skills.name: suede-site-alchemy
skills.description: Turn a page into a conversion path: hero, friction, proof, CTA, pricing, A/B ideas, quick wins, and mobile CRO.
skills.useWhen: Improve page conversion, package website growth offers, or route conversion work into the full design workflow.

skills.name: suede-sync-packaging
skills.description: Prep songs for sync pitches: scene angles, one-sheets, clean and instrumental assets, lyric flags, mood tags, rights questions, and links.
skills.useWhen: Prepare a song or catalog asset for film, TV, ads, games, trailers, creator campaigns, or brand briefs with clear open questions.

skills.name: suede-visibility-grader
skills.description: Grade a public page for launch appeal: findability, first-screen clarity, CTA pull, proof quality, and AI citation readiness.
skills.useWhen: Judge whether a page can be found, understood, trusted, cited by AI systems, acted on, and promoted with confidence.

skills.name: suede-workflow-skills
skills.description: Umbrella workflow for 27 public skills: copy, design, code review, SEO, launch packaging, MCP QA, iOS and Android app shipping, and creator workflows.
skills.useWhen: Load the full public Suede workflow pack from one GitHub skill path with the quality gates intact.
